##RRUFFID=R110089

##LOCALITY=Mammoth-St Anthony mine, Tiger, Pinal County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Brent Thorne and Joe Ruiz
##DESCRIPTION=Pale green granular, associated with blue diaboleite

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
